column1: 少しなりとも助けになれれば幸いです。
column2: すこしなりともたすけになれればさいわいです。
column3: I would be glad if I could be of even a little help.
column4: なりとも (even a little, at least, even just)
column6: expresses willingness to accept even the minimum of the named thing; 'even a little of X would be acceptable'
column8: なりとも = even a little is acceptable; せめて = at least (minimum wish); でも = even/or; だけでも = even just (same nuance)
